title: Vibrant Aerated Mediterranean shichimi-togarashi Pilaf
description: A smoky, aerated, romantic Mediterranean dish featuring shichimi-togarashi, perfect for a paleo-friendly dinner. Serve in a beautiful tagliere.
instructions: Heat chicken broth in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add 1 cup of quinoa and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
While quinoa cooks, toast 1 tablespoon of sesame seeds in a small pan over low heat.
Grind 1 teaspoon of shichimi togarashi in a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Add ground shichimi togarashi and toasted sesame seeds to quinoa and stir to combine.
Stir in 1 tablespoon of olive oil and season with salt to taste.
Transfer quinoa mixture to a tagliere and top with chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or cilantro.
